---
title: "Scatter Plots"
author: "Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Scatter Plots}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---




```r
library(manCTMed)
```

## Population Total, Direct, and Indirect Effects

Total, direct, and indirect effects for the drift matrix

\begin{equation}
    \left(
    \begin{array}{ccc}
         -0.357 & 0 & 0 \\
         0.771 & -0.511 & 0 \\
         -0.450 & 0.729 & -0.693 \\
    \end{array}
    \right)
\end{equation}


```r
FigPlotEffects()
```

<img src="fig-vignettes-scatter-plots-unnamed-chunk-3-1.png" width="3300" />

## Evaluation of Confidence Intervals

Presented below are scatter plots of coverage probabilities and power for the $\eta_X \to \eta_M \ to \eta_Y$ model and type I error rates for the $\eta_Y \to \eta_M \ to \eta_X$ model.


```r
data(results, package = "manCTMed")
```

### Coverage Probabilities

#### Time-Intervals 1 to 28


```r
FigScatterPlotCoverage(results, delta_t = 1:28)
```

<img src="fig-vignettes-scatter-plots-unnamed-chunk-5-1.png" width="3300" />

#### Time-Intervals 1 to 4


```r
FigScatterPlotCoverage(results, delta_t = 1:4)
```

<img src="fig-vignettes-scatter-plots-unnamed-chunk-6-1.png" width="3300" />

#### Time-Intervals 5 to 28


```r
FigScatterPlotCoverage(results, delta_t = 5:28)
```

<img src="fig-vignettes-scatter-plots-unnamed-chunk-7-1.png" width="3300" />

### Statistical Power


```r
FigScatterPlotPower(results, 1:28)
```

<img src="fig-vignettes-scatter-plots-unnamed-chunk-8-1.png" width="3300" />

### Type I Error Rate


```r
FigScatterPlotType1(results, 1:28)
```

<img src="fig-vignettes-scatter-plots-unnamed-chunk-9-1.png" width="3300" />
